steps.title: Use distance equals rate times time
steps.content: The relationship $\text{distance} = \text{rate} \times \text{time}$ tells us: walking distance $= 2w$ miles, running distance $= 7r$ miles.

steps.title: Sum and set equal to total distance
steps.content:
Total distance equals walking distance plus running distance: $2w + 7r$ miles. Since Nicole travels 13 miles total:
$$2w + 7r = 13$$
That matches Choice A — $2w+7r=13$.
